feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business One System Requirements for HANA and SQL Versions
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing SAP Business One (on-premise) for our clients, both HANA and SQL Server versions.

We understand that for SAP Business One on HANA, the typical minimum requirements is 64 GB RAM. It is just information. We are not aware of any clear hardware sizing guidelines. Plus, we only know certified servers list, it means we cannot install SAP Business One on other servers? 

Could you please advise on the exact system requirements and sizing parameters for both versions?
Additionally, is there any official sizing template or calculator available to estimate the overall hardware requirements?

 


SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One @Darius

entry.title: Planned expense for the expense which is being consisted of Standard cost
entry.content:
In CO-PA report <Tr-cd: KEPM>, it is possible to check plannd amount for expenses.
One of the expenses which are able to check is the expense which is being consisted of Standard cost (e.g. Direct material cost, Machine process cost etc...).
The expenses are calculated automatically based on the followng formula:
Standrad cost whose Costing Variant is ZPC1　×　Planned produced quantity
However, only specific Version of Planning levels, we would like to use Standrad cost whose Costing Variant is YPC1, not ZPC1.
Do you know if it is possible?

entry.title: How to switch off E-Mail notifcation for flexible workflow?
entry.content:
Hi, I have got the problem that I cannot simply switch off the email notification for flexible workflow for sales objects. I have copied the email template for the sales order to xx_02000006_CRT_9 and the email is sent out correctly, whenever an approval is required. But I have got the problem, that I want to test the email notification in our test system. And we are using real users with real email adresses within our company. So we want to test, but we don't want to bother the colleagues with many unnecessary emails from our test system all the time.
That's why I would like to have the possibility to easily switch off the email notification. Either depending on the function group or on the  workflow object. Currently I have only the possibility to delete the user defined email template xx_02000006_CRT_9. And transport the changes to our test system. I could not find any customiziable flag, to stop sending emails. Could someone please give me a hint?
The other question is: the emails are sent out immediately as high priority. That's why I cannot stop the from sending in transaction SOST. Is there any way to change it to low priority, so that they are not sent immediately?
Thanks for your help
Gaby

entry.title: Instance for Data Attribute Recommendation cannot be created
entry.content:
Hello, wanted to try out Data Attribute Recommendation in SAP Hana Trial account. In December it was working fine, but when I tried again in February, Instance creation is stuck. Creating service Data Attribute Recommendation takes a long time, about a day, after which an error occurs that the wait time has been exceeded.

Steps to recreate:

  1. Created SAP Hana trial.
  2. Created AWS US-east subaccount.
  3. Used either Booster to set up account for Data Attribute Recommendation or created service manually (tried with different Runtime Environments, and each time subaccount was deleted and created anew)
  4. After near a day long wait, error occurs about waiting time being exceeded

entry.title: ATC Execution in HANA 2025 does not show any results
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are converting ECC to S/4 HANA 2025.

After conversion we have setup ATC to check all the findings in all our custom objects. Using the latest simplification DB and have set up ATC like we did in our previous projects, but somehow after executing ATC we don't see any results at all.

In our previous projects, where we are on HANA 2023, ATC works perfectly fine. Is there any difference between HANA 2023 and HANA 2025 from ATC perspective?

Any insights would be highly appreciated as we are running out of options now and not able to  proceed with the custom code remediation.

Regards,

Pankaj Agarwal

entry.title: Initial App Update Taking Long - (Standard SSAM v2511.0.0 // SSAM v2505/2405 on S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager standard application(v2511.0.0) on S/4HANA. After scanning the app QR code, the initial app update has been taking a long time, and the app update pop-up is also delayed.

• S/4HANA
• SSAM versions: 2405 and 2505
• Standard client application version: 2511.0.0



Could you please advise how we can resolve this issue? Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: SELECT into TABLE and translate field contents
entry.content:
The following statement gets a certain DocEntry from the invoices (OINV) and joins it with a user defined value from the definition of PaymentGroups (OCTG):

SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."GroupNum", T1."U_ShowPayment" from "OINV" T0
	LEFT JOIN "OCTG" T1 ON T1."GroupNum" = T0."GroupNum"
	where T0."DocEntry" = '18057';

That user-defined value is for example 'K';

a) how do I get this whole table into a variable?

I already have a procedure that can get the translation for this flag, so I can call

/* 9   = selected language, that is known
 * 'K' = the value in field 'U_ShowPayment'
 */
call mytrans('OCTG', 'ShowPayment', 'K', 9).

b) how can I change the 'K' in the resulting table for the value returned by mytrans() either directly in the select or afterwards in the resulting table?

entry.title: How to join a parameterized view?
entry.content:
The view:

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "q_UFTrans"
(
	IN  TableName     NVARCHAR(30),
	IN  UserField     NVARCHAR(30),
	IN  LangInt       int
)

AS
	
	SELECT T0."FldValue", T3."Trans", T0."Descr"
		FROM          "UFD1" T0
			LEFT JOIN "CUFD" T1 ON (T0."FieldID" = T1."FieldID" AND T0."TableID" = T1."TableID")
			LEFT JOIN "OMLT" T2 ON T2."TableName" = 'UFD1'
			LEFT JOIN "MLT1" T3 ON T2."TranEntry" = T3."TranEntry" AND T3."LangCode" = :LangInt
		WHERE T0."TableID"  = :TableName;

It works:

However, if I try to join that in the following code....

	SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."GroupNum", T1."U_ShowPayment", T2."Trans" from "OINV" T0
	LEFT JOIN "OCTG" T1 ON T1."GroupNum" = T0."GroupNum"
	LEFT JOIN "q_UFTrans"('OCTG','ShowPayment',9) T2 ON T2."FldValue" = T1."U_ShowPayment" 
	where T0."DocEntry" = '18057';

... I get the error:
SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: Parameterized view with unused parameter: q_UFTrans

What is going on here? How do I join with a parameterized view?

entry.title: What contains under unused_data of disk_overview query
entry.content:
Hello team,
We want to know what exactly is contained under the unused_data of the disk_overview query.

There no any sap note/kba/blog to provide excatly wahat is available in un_used data.

Thanks,

Ameya

entry.title: upload pictures?
entry.content:
In Step 5c of "Enhance the Business Object Data Model and Enable OData Streams" (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-rap100-enhance-data-model.html), you should be able to upload an image, but even though I have written "@Semantics.largeObject" in STEP 2, the Upload File button does not appear when I open the Travel entity.

CDS data definition

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #MANDATORY
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@ObjectModel.sapObjectNodeType.name: 'ZRAP100_ATRAV90B'
@EndUserText.label: '###GENERATED Core Data Service Entity'
define root view entity ZR_RAP100_ATRAV90B
  as select from zrap100_atrav90b as Travel

  association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Agency            as _Agency        on $projection.AgencyID = _Agency.AgencyID
  association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Customer          as _Customer      on $projection.CustomerID = _Customer.CustomerID
  association [1..1] to /DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH as _Overallstatus on $projection.OverallStatus = _Overallstatus.OverallStatus
  association [0..1] to I_Currency               as _Currency      on $projection.CurrencyCode = _Currency.Currency
{
  key travel_id             as TravelID,
      agency_id             as AgencyID,
      customer_id           as CustomerID,
      begin_date            as BeginDate,
      end_date              as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee           as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price           as TotalPrice,
      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ {
        entity.name: 'I_CurrencyStdVH',
        entity.element: 'Currency',
        useForValidation: true
      } ]
      currency_code         as CurrencyCode,
      description           as Description,
      overall_status        as OverallStatus,
      @Semantics.largeObject: { mimeType: 'MimeType',   //case-sensitive
                             fileName: 'FileName',   //case-sensitive
                             acceptableMimeTypes: ['image/png', 'image/jpeg'],
                             contentDispositionPreference: #ATTACHMENT }
      attachment            as Attachment,
      @Semantics.mimeType: true
      mime_type             as MimeType,
      file_name             as FileName,
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      created_by            as CreatedBy,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      created_at            as CreatedAt,
      @Semantics.user.localInstanceLastChangedBy: true
      local_last_changed_by as LocalLastChangedBy,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
      local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
      last_changed_at       as LastChangedAt,

      // public assosiations
      _Customer,
      _Agency,
      _Overallstatus,
      _Currency
}

entry.title: Unable to Update Data in Custom External S/4HANA OData Service (SSAM2405)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to integrate an additional external S/4HANA OData service (our own custom service) into the standard SAP Service and Asset Manager (SSAM) 2405 application.

Steps we followed:

  1. Created a destination in SAP Mobile Services for our external S/4HANA service.

     2. Added the service to the standard SSAM metadata by creating a new service in the Z component  

           

     3. After synchronization, the service metadata was generated successfully (XML created without errors)

     4. We are able to read data from the backend service successfully in the application

Issue:

When we try to update data from the Edit page, the Save action triggers the OData Update action, but the data is not updated. We are receiving an Internal Server Error.

In the backend traces, only GET requests are being triggered. There are no POST or PUT requests being sent during the update operation.

 

Question:

Is it supported to use a custom external S/4HANA OData service within the standard SSAM metadata?

If yes:

  • Are there any additional configuration steps required to update the data? Have we missed anything?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: Given a Customer Account set up as a ship-to partner function of another account find that sold-to
entry.content:
In SAP HANA I have a customer account, call it 1001234 - it represents a customer, with many ship-to locations. So it is my sold-to account number.

Also I have an account, call it 5009876 and it represents one specific ship-to location/address.

In 1001234, under "Sales and Distribution" in the Partner Functions table, I assign 5009876 as a Ship-To party of 1001234.

I do not maintain anything in the new "Relationships" section of 1001234

Is it possible, by looking at the screens for account 5009876 to know that it was assigned as a ship to partner function of 1001234?

This was possible in ECC using the "Customer Partner Functions" choice in the "Extras" menu when viewing 5009876.

entry.title: Partial stock transfer of QI stock
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

following situation:

I post the PGR of 10 hobbocks in our external warehouse(A) which runs into QI-stock.

For a quality inspection i want to move only 1 hobbock with a stock transfer to my warehouse(B) as best all quantities remains the whole time in QI. An UD is obligated at the end.

Its all within the same plant, only 2 different stor.locs.

At the moment i have two options: 

1. A complete pre-release of the inspection LOT to unrestricted and moving (MIGO) 1 hobbock from "A" to "B", but then the whole quantity is in unrestricted although its not physically QI-approved and could be used by mistake. This is the current procedure.

2. Use the QAC2 to move the complete quantity based on the LOT while its in QI, but thats makes no sense for my issue, because i need just 1 hobbock in "B".

Maybe s.o. have a smart and easy solution to handle this.

Thanks in advance and br,

Simon

entry.title: Assistance Required for SAP HANA System Replication (HSR) & Scale‑Up High Availability Configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We have completed the installation of the SAP HANA database on both the primary node (currently running with business data) and the secondary node (with no business data).

I am seeking your assistance in configuring SAP PERSON_NAME System Replication (HSR) and setting up a Scale‑Up High Availability (HA) environment for our SAP HANA database.

At present, neither the system replication nor the HA setup has been configured. We request your guidance and support to complete the configuration according to SAP best practices.

We request SAP’s support for the following activities:

  1. Guidance on configuring SAP HANA System Replication (HSR) between the primary and secondary nodes.
  2. Assistance with the correct configuration sequence, including:
    • Initial data load
    • Secondary node registration
    • Activation of replication
    • Validation and health checks
  3. Recommendations for Scale‑Up High Availability setup, including best practices for:
    • Replication mode (sync / syncmem / async)
    • Operation mode (logreplay)
    • Cluster integration with Pacemaker (if applicable)
  4. Verification that the planned architecture is aligned with SAP recommendations and supported configurations.
  5. Clarification on any prerequisite checks, logs, or additional information required from our side to proceed.

We are ready to provide diagnostic logs, system replication outputs, landscape information, or any other details upon request.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hana SQL Command Network Protocol Deprecation/Sunset
entry.content: I remember reading somewhere that the Hana SQL Command Network Protocol might be getting shut down in the next few years, but I was unable to find that information when I went looking for it. As the new products move away from using that protocol and some of the official drivers on GitHub are no longer being supported (Python), does anyone know of any plans to shut down that protocol for future versions of the Hana product? If so, is there a definitive timeline for that?

entry.title: SAP BASIS associate certification exam after the sap migration
entry.content: Hi all, am planning for an SAP BASIS associate certification.. what are the courses to cover and exams i should write? has the exam released in new format?  can someone confirm? thanks

entry.title: How to have multiple schedules in service call whenever there is a contract?
entry.content:
Hi,
I'm unable to add another schedule when the service call has a contract linked to it.
The service call is still open, and I can enter the schedule details in the row, but it won’t save.
I tested another service call without a contract, and in that case I can add additional schedules without any issue.
The contract is active (not terminated), and in the Document Settings for Service Calls, the option “Scheduling of multiple tickets” is enabled. I also have full authorization for the Service Call module.

Can anyone help me? 
Thanks

entry.title: Enable Offline Store for Online OData Service in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently using an online OData service ( S/4HANA) - SSAM2405, but I would like to enable an offline store option so that functions like updates can be performed offline, similar to how offline services work.

This screenshot shows the offline service

Is there a way to enable offline store directly for an online OData service? If not, are there any alternatives or best practices to use an online service in a local/offline store?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One

entry.title: CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE
entry.content:
How do I create or replace a type in HANA 2.0 SP5?

I want to create a type if it currently does not exist. How do I do that?

entry.title: Customer overwritten during CO-PA derivation (SD to CO-PA mismatch)
entry.content:
Hi all!

I’m struggling with a derivation issue where the Customer (KUNNR) is being overwritten during the billing release to CO-PA.

  • SD Billing (VF03): The customer is correctly set as Client A.

  • Profitability Segment (KE24): The customer is changed to Client B.

I have traced the derivation flow and found that the system moves a value from a custom field  into a CO-PA characteristic and then performs a Table Access to derive/overwrite the Customer.

Has anyone experienced a situation where standard SD customer data is aggressively overwritten by a KEDR Table Access?

Thank you!
